category_sources: Official Ecasound documentation describes audio processing, multitrack recording, effects, LADSPA, and control interfaces.
source_facts.description says it is a multitrack-capable audio recorder and effect processor.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and homepage use Ecasound.
docs_sources: Official Ecasound documentation index links examples, tutorials, user guide, man pages, and developer material.
repo_sources: Official Ecasound download page lists the GitHub tree kaivehmanen/ecasound and the master git tree for development.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers Ecasound user guide, man pages, effects/plugins, and audio processing interfaces.
source_facts.description identifies multitrack recording and effect processing.
